sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Product Portfolio & Market Dynamics
required_elements: Therapeutic area focus and revenue concentration across top products
FDA pathway classification and regulatory status (510(k) vs. PMA)
Procedure volume and clinical adoption curves by indication
Competitive landscape and threat of procedural displacement

sections.title: Reimbursement & Pricing Economics
required_elements: Reimbursement coverage policies and CPT code rates
Health economics value proposition to payers (cost per QALY)
Average Selling Price (ASP) trends and erosion trajectory
CMS policy and regulatory pricing pressure risk quantification

sections.title: Installed Base & Recurring Revenue Economics
required_elements: Installed base size and annual installation rate with replacement cycle
Consumables/disposables pull-through revenue per installed unit
Service and maintenance revenue as % of total and gross margin
Subscription/software recurring revenue and % of total revenue

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: EV/Revenue multiples by product development stage
Recurring revenue multiple premium for consumables and services
Adjusted EBITDA and FCF margin projections
Pipeline-adjusted NPV with FDA approval and adoption probabilities

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Procedure volume trend deceleration and market saturation signals
Reimbursement cuts or coverage denial tracking
FDA safety/efficacy signals and adverse event monitoring
Competitive entry and market share loss assessment

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Procedure volume sustainability and market saturation analysis
Reimbursement stability and ASP erosion sensitivity modeling
Installed base growth and consumables revenue expansion visibility
